noise_environment.label: low
noise_environment.summary: Strongly prefers a quiet environment for focus.

noise_environment.label: moderate
noise_environment.summary: Can accommodate noise when it is contained.

noise_environment.label: low
noise_environment.summary: Prefers changing location when the environment is noisy.

noise_environment.label: low
noise_environment.summary: Needs very quiet conditions to settle down.

noise_environment.label: high
noise_environment.summary: Normal room noise does not usually disrupt sleep.

noise_environment.label: moderate
noise_environment.summary: Noise tolerance depends on the situation.

social_interaction.label: high
social_interaction.summary: Wants a close and regularly social roommate relationship.

social_interaction.label: moderate
social_interaction.summary: Prefers friendly social connection with some balance.

social_interaction.label: low
social_interaction.summary: Prefers an independent and respectful roommate dynamic.

social_interaction.label: moderate
social_interaction.summary: Does not express a strong social preference.

social_interaction.label: high
social_interaction.summary: Shared presence tends to feel energizing.

social_interaction.label: moderate
social_interaction.summary: Prefers a balance of shared and solo time.

social_interaction.label: low
social_interaction.summary: Feels best when home is mostly private time.

study_daily_routine.label: high
study_daily_routine.summary: Strongly prefers an early and predictable routine.

study_daily_routine.label: high
study_daily_routine.summary: Has a defined preference for a later routine.

study_daily_routine.label: high
study_daily_routine.summary: Needs explicit quiet protections around early mornings.

study_daily_routine.label: moderate
study_daily_routine.summary: Prefers mutual adjustments when routines conflict.

study_daily_routine.label: moderate
study_daily_routine.summary: Uses separate spaces to protect routine needs.

cultural_openness.label: high
cultural_openness.summary: Responds to unfamiliar routines with curiosity.

cultural_openness.label: moderate
cultural_openness.summary: Can respect differences while keeping routines distinct.

cultural_openness.label: moderate
cultural_openness.summary: Feels more comfortable with clear shared-space agreements.

cultural_openness.label: moderate
cultural_openness.summary: Needs time to understand unfamiliar routines.

cultural_openness.label: high
cultural_openness.summary: Prefers open discussion when routines differ.

cultural_openness.label: moderate
cultural_openness.summary: Prefers a pause before discussing a misunderstanding.

cultural_openness.label: moderate
cultural_openness.summary: Uses shared agreements to navigate differences.

cultural_openness.label: moderate
cultural_openness.summary: Would welcome structured support during a misunderstanding.

household_structure.label: high
household_structure.summary: Feels relaxed with regular chore schedules.

household_structure.label: high
household_structure.summary: Wants clear responsibility boundaries for chores.

household_structure.label: low
household_structure.summary: Can handle household tasks informally as they arise.

household_structure.label: moderate
household_structure.summary: Prefers deciding together and adjusting as needed.

household_structure.label: high
household_structure.summary: Prefers clear boundaries around personal supplies.

household_structure.label: high
household_structure.summary: Is comfortable sharing items under explicit agreements.

household_structure.label: low
household_structure.summary: Finds informal sharing of everyday supplies comfortable.

household_structure.label: moderate
household_structure.summary: Prefers deciding about shared supplies item by item.

communication_conflict.label: high
communication_conflict.summary: Prefers raising repeated household issues directly and soon.

communication_conflict.label: moderate
communication_conflict.summary: Prefers time to cool off before discussing conflict.

communication_conflict.label: moderate
communication_conflict.summary: Feels more comfortable beginning difficult conversations by message.

communication_conflict.label: high
communication_conflict.summary: Prefers setting aside time to resolve a household issue.

communication_conflict.label: high
communication_conflict.summary: Prefers clearing up smaller concerns promptly.

communication_conflict.label: moderate
communication_conflict.summary: Prefers discussing issues later the same day.

communication_conflict.label: high
communication_conflict.summary: Feels more ready when a conversation has a planned time.

communication_conflict.label: moderate
